    More info
    eBird
     2 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) (David Kelly) "2 males, known birds off eastern end of the scrapes."
  • Surf Scoter
    More info
    eBird
     2 Musselburgh Lagoons (Stuart Housden) "2 Drakes on sea"
  • Surf Scoter
    More info
    eBird
     2 Sea wall at Musselburgh (Mark O'Brien) "Patchwork white heads stood out, even from a distance"
  • Velvet Scoter
    More info
    eBird
     20 Sea wall at Musselburgh (Mark O'Brien) "Regular sightings, most birds just sitting on sea, makes showing white teardrop, females all dark, including cheeks. In 2 or 3 separate clocks, one of which included the surf scoters."
  • Velvet Scoter
    More info
    eBird
     6 Musselburgh--Levenhall Links (General) (David Kelly) "Not rare here."
  • Velvet Scoter
    More info
    eBird
     6 Musselburgh Lagoons (Stuart Housden) "Small group offshore. The 2 Surf Scoters were with them."

     1 Whitesands Quarry (Sasha Bertasius) "Continuing bird, seen from dirt track at the Eastern side of the quarry with hundreds of Greylag geese, female bird. Very orange goose-like waterfowl with pale face and dark bill and legs."
